name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late reports. We automate spend extraction instead of manual spreadsheets and reports.
problem_solved: Manual data entry and spend analysis inefficiencies.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual data entry and spend analysis inefficiencies.
